name: Maries Dip-Nutty Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the thawed and well-drained frozen chopped spinach, dry vegetable soup mixture, and chopped walnuts.
2. Add the contents of the Maries Ranch Salad jar to the bowl.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
4. Garnish with additional chopped walnuts.
5. Serve with fresh vegetables for dipping or use as a filling for fresh mushroom caps.
6. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
